name: Soulcursed Scythe
description: Notes Part of the Vampire Rogue Set.
effects: While Lethal Strike is active: Shoots a powerful scythe Chain Damage: 50 ( Ignores defense of target) Blade Damage: 100-300 (average: 200) Scythe Range: 5.5 tiles Shots hit multiple targets (scythe/chain) Shots pass through obstacles (scythe/chain)
